programme.desc: A former gang member, Gabriel, tries to escape his past, but his old accomplice, Reggie, pulls him back into crime. Gabriel finds solace learning cello from a blind teacher. When faced with a robbery, Gabriel chooses a new path, inspiring Reggie to do the same.

programme.desc: Ricky, a high school dropout and former drug dealer, faces his father's constant disapproval. Given a second chance at a janitorial job, he creates a revolutionary chip flavor, rising to COO and finally earning his father's pride.

programme.title: Poor Grandpa Evicted On Christmas
programme.desc: Evicted on Christmas Eve, Grandpa Clyde appeals to his landlord's conscience. The landlord's mother intervenes, revealing Clyde once saved her from eviction. Recognizing the principle of "Pay It Forward," the landlord offers Clyde a job and a second chance.

programme.title: Family Learns The Meaning Of Christmas
programme.desc: Tiffany's dad judges her yoga instructor boyfriend, Marcus, and investigates him, finding he is in debt and was sued by his family. Marcus defends himself, revealing he is a CEO who donated his inheritance. He wins over her father and proposes.

programme.title: Roommate Sabotages Guys Date
programme.desc: Sam plans an elaborate Valentine's Day for Tyra, but his jealous roommate Chad sabotages everything. Despite the mishaps, Tyra is touched by Sam's thoughtful, homemade gifts, ultimately choosing his genuine affection over Chad's flashy but deceitful gestures.

programme.title: Girl Becomes Fake Wife For 180 Days
programme.desc: A talented but poor artist, Clarice, and Ken, a rich architect, fake a marriage for Ken's career. Lies unravel, but they learn true success comes from their own merit and mutual support, leading them to pursue their dreams together.

programme.title: Popular Guy Falls In Love With Shy Girl
programme.desc: Obsessive anime-lover Mina stalks Calvin, her crush, but his rejection and public humiliation crush her. Befriended by popular Ryan, she slowly falls for him, discovering he secretly reciprocates her intense admiration.

programme.title: Guy Dates Four Girls At Once

programme.title: The Eleven

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode of Minutes With, Gwen Adshead gives us an insightful account of her 30-year career as one of the UK's leading forensic psychiatrists. Gwen recounts her experience working beyond the walls of the UK's high security prisons and hospitals. Gwen remembers meeting the Yorkshire Ripper inside Broadmoor, hearing about the ways murderers cut up bodies and offers us an unprecedented look inside a therapy session with a serial killer.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this timely episode, actress, model and comedian Emily Atack discusses harassment of women and current protection policies.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode of Minutes With, we hear from Stuart Wingford Taylor about his remarkable life inside the UK's most notorious prisons. Throughout his 24 years as a high-security prison officer, Stuart has come face-to-face with some of Britain's most notorious criminals, including Joanna Dennehy, Eunice Spry and Michael Stone. He tells us about the deadly homemade weapons inmates fashion out of soap and toothbrushes, prisoners' plots to murder guards and the gang violence that runs one London jail.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Former New York Mafia boss Michael Franzese was a caporegime in the Colombo crime family. In this episode, he tells us how he made a fortune in his scheme to defraud the federal government out of gasoline taxes and how he turned his life around.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Mick Hawkes discusses his incredible experiences going undercover for the SAS. From being posted to Northern Ireland during ‘The Troubles' and operating surveillance to finding himself in hot water behind enemy lines in Bosnia.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: This week, we sat down with anti-knife crime activist Faron Paul to discuss how he survived being stabbed 18 times, and how he campaigns against knife crime, taking over 1200 weapons off the streets of London.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this episode, we spoke to intrepid explorer Benedict Allen who has nearly died nine times throughout his career - including when he was threatened by gold miners, contracted deadly malaria and was shot at by Pablo Escobar's hitmen. Benedict relives his experience of becoming the first person to cross the Amazon Basin and getting lost alone in the rainforest for weeks without food, shelter or water. This desperate situation led him to make one of the toughest decisions of his life and moulded him into the explorer we meet today.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: In this weeks episode of Minutes With we sat down with Mirsad Solakovic, a Bosnian refugee who was forced to flee to the UK with his family. Mirsad tells us about the torture he suffered at the hands of his Serbian school teacher, the time he spent in a concentration camp and how this gave him PTSD.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Paul Mescal and his Aftersun co-star Frankie Corio compare UK and Irish snacks! Paul introduces Frankie to some Irish snacks, including a Tayto sandwich and Ballymaloe Relish, and neither enjoyed an iconic British spread!

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: In this very funny episode, Jake Gyllenhaal and Gabrielle Union do incredible impressions, Jake reveals his surprising pineapple-on-pizza take, and Gabrielle tries British chocolate for the first time. Oppenheimer stars Emily Blunt and Matt Damon debate whether British food is better than American food and whether you should clap when your plane lands. Matt also reveals why kissing Scarlett Johansson was 'hell'!

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Timothée Chalamet and Austin Butler pit US and UK foods against each other to see who takes the ultimate title of reigning snack champion. The pair has a great time being introduced to British classics, and cause carnage trying a royal favourite! Millie Bobby Brown tackles meals from the UK and the US, including carrot cake, liquorice allsorts and energy drinks. The Stranger Things star compares Bovril to a Starbucks vanilla latte, and faces her biggest food gripe: quinoa.

programme.title: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest stars Chris Wood and Morgan Gibbs-White debate some of the biggest football debates. The striker and the midfielder discuss scoring a worldie long-range striker or a tap-in? And who would make the best manager?

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay, Paul Ainsworth and Nyesha Arrington film a special 'Chef's Edition' of Snack Wars: England Vs USA. Gordon Ramsay throws a Pop-Tart, he judges beans on toast and they all have incredible reactions to Toxic Waste!

programme.title: Agree to Disagree

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy's return from Europe is far from the homecoming she anticipated when she finds herself struggling to integrate back into life at Heartland and her relationship with Ty. Meanwhile, Jack and Lisa have been waiting to reveal their marriage to the family, but discover that finding the right moment to make the announcement is more difficult than expected. And Georgie unearths a secret that will cause her to lose faith in an idol.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: After her initial shock at her grandfather's announcement, Lou throws herself into party planning mode and forces Jack into an awkward reunion with an old acquaintance. Ty becomes the middleman when Amy and Caleb butt heads over horse training. And still reeling from her recent discovery, Georgie pulls away from Amy and focuses on donating money to an online animal sanctuary.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy's attempts to reunite with Georgie are continually thwarted by the arrival of lavish gifts from afar. When Tim is captivated by an old acquaintance, he and Jack team up for a charity event. Meanwhile, Lou and Peter disagree about potential pre-schools and Lou takes Katie for an assessment. And an unexpected revelation forces Ty to question his career prospects.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: A surprise visitor at Heartland makes an unwelcome declaration and Amy is forced to deal with the devastating consequences. Meanwhile, a dire animal crisis at the Reserve eerily parallels Ty's personal life when he realizes that some things just can't be saved. Still stinging from Katie's pre-school rejection, Lou's insistence that a specialist test her daughter brings an unexpected result. And Georgie realizes she needs her own trick riding horse in order to keep up with her nemesis Olivia.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy struggles to turn a pair of horses into a team, and is forced to go head-to-head with a rival trainer. Meanwhile, Ty discovers a dead bear on the Reserve with its gallbladder missing but when he begins asking too many questions, poachers threaten his life. When Ty asks Georgie to care for an orphan wolf pup, she sees it as an opportunity to reunite Amy and Ty. And Lou hires Jade to work at the Dude Ranch but quickly regrets her decision when the unpredictable teen becomes a problem employee, taking advantage of her situation.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy struggles to help a Hutterite family whose team of Percherons ran amok during a hayride. But Georgie forms a strong bond with the young Hutterite daughter who turns out to be the key to unraveling the mystery. While Tim admittedly had a fantastic time traveling the rodeo circuit with Casey, he returns to Heartland and begins to second-guess their burgeoning relationship. Meanwhile, back at the clinic, a significant vet victory for Ty proves to be a bittersweet triumph when he realizes that all he wants to do – is share the experience with Amy. And Jack is forced to confront his traditional ideals when Lisa informs him that she has no intention of taking his name.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: A school project opens a door to Georgie's past that could ultimately change her life at Heartland. Meanwhile, Casey expresses interest in buying one of Ty and Caleb's bulldogging horses and Caleb enlists Amy's help to train it in order to secure the deal. Then, while celebrating their first big sale, Ty tells Caleb that he wants to officially pull out of their business partnership, which results in Caleb forging an unlikely alliance. And Tim is forced to come clean about his senior rodeo circuit dreams when he learns that Casey is buying him a bulldogging horse.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When a threat of a cull looms over a herd of wild horses, Jack and Amy go to the aid of an old friend in Pike River. Amy finds herself contending with a flood of bittersweet memories, but she seizes the opportunity to get back to her roots and reclaim what she has lost. Then, when Tim tricks Ty into accompanying him on a trip it has an unexpected result when Ty recognizes what it is he really wants. Meanwhile, Lou and Peter find themselves at loggerheads when Peter arrives late for a staycation with Georgie and Katie at the Dude Ranch. The tension between them rises until they are confronted with an outside threat that could destroy the family unit.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E1
programme.sub-title: I, Darrin, Take This Witch Samantha
programme.desc: Samantha and Darrin appear to be an ideally matched couple. Very much in love, they decide to marry. Darrin doesn't know that Samantha, is, of all things, a witch. On their wedding night, Samantha's mother, Endora, a witch, of course, visits her daughter. Regretting that her daughter has married a mortal, she is bent on breaking up the marriage. After pleading with her mother not to interfere, Samantha decides to tell her husband that he has unknowingly married a witch. To convince Darrin of her magic powers, Samantha performs a series of tricks. Darrin makes her promise never to practice her witchcraft again. Sheila, a former girl friend of Darrin's, invites the newly-weds to a dinner party. She makes every effort to embarrass Samantha before the guests. After enduring Sheila's snubs and insults, Samantha cannot resist evening the score. She employs her extraordinary powers to humiliate Sheila. Later, at home, Darrin rebukes his wife, but admits Sheila deserved the tricks played on her.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E3
programme.sub-title: It Shouldn't Happen to a Dog
programme.desc: Samantha gives a dinner party to impress Rex Barker, one of Darrin's clients. Rex brings along his date, Babs Livingston, but advances on Samantha in the garden when he gets drunk.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E4
programme.desc: Gladys Kravitz, a neighbor, is unable to convince her husband, Abner, that strange things seem to be happening at the Stephens' home. Gladys, June Foster, and Shirley Clyde, with their sons, visit the Stephens' home to welcome Samantha to the community. Gladys is frustrated in her attempts to point out to her friends the amazing number of objects which seem to appear and disappear. When the boys pester Endora, Samantha's mother, she uses magic to tie the three of them up. On leaving, Gladys tries to point out to her friends that it would be physically impossible for three boys to tie themselves up. Later Darrin returns home for his first meeting with Endora. Endora and Darrin soon engage in a heated argument about their opposing viewpoints on life. Endora threatens to turn Darrin into as artichoke. Later Samantha expresses her love for Darrin by announcing that if Endora had done so, she would also have turned herself into an artichoke.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E6
programme.desc: Darrin discovers that Samantha has been entertaining a guest each morning after he leaves for work. the guest is ten year old Marshall Burns. Marshall's mother is a widow, whose over-protectiveness has robbed Marshall of all his self-confidence. Darrin tells Samantha that she has no right to interfere with Mrs. Burns' upbringing of her son. Despite Marshall's belief that he is no good at anything, Samantha takes him to a Junior League ball game. Marshall has never been able to make the team. Floyd Kravitz, nephew of Gladys Kravitz, is the star player. With a little witchery on Samantha's part, Marshall becomes a triple threat. When his mother, fearful that he may be inured, forbids him to play, Marshall runs away from home. Samantha and Darrin drive Mrs. Burns to the ball field. There, Marshall, in his own right, has continued to star. How-ever, when Marshall gets into a tight spot, Darrin forbids Samantha from interfering. Marshall makes it on his own. Proud of her son, Mrs. Burns is not unhappy when Coach Gribben suggests that he visit the Burns home to give Marshall some extra coaching.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E7
programme.desc: Samantha, her friends, Bertha and Mary, and her Aunt Clara, all witches, decide to change the popular conception of witches into a more flattering image. Their opportunity arises when Darrin, an ad man, is assigned to devise a trademark for a new type of Halloween candy. Mr. Brinkman, the promoter of the candy, wants the trademark to show a traditional witch. Darrin at first agrees, but when he sees how upset Samantha becomes, he decides to present a beautiful witch. Mr. Brinkman objects, but Darrin refuses to yield. Con-sequently, he is fired. The witches decide to practice some of their pranks on Mr. Brinkman. As a topper, they transform him into an ugly old witch. Mr. Brinkman finally admits that his idea of witches is wrong. He agrees to use a glamorous witch for his trademark. Samantha wins her point, and Darrin wins back his job.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E8
programme.desc: Teenager Liza Randall interviews Darrin about his career in advertising for a school newspaper. After Darrin takes Liza to the agency on Saturday, Liza's jealous boy friend, Marvin "Monster" Grogan, visits Samantha. Monster, a football star, wants to batter Darrin. Samantha, stuffing Monster with food, explains the innocence of Darrin and Lisa's relationship, although she knows Liza is more than interested in Darrin. At the office, Liza pours drinks. Liza and Darrin are doused when Darrin tries to take the drink away from her. Darrin escapes an awkward situation when boss Larry Tate arrives with two prospective clients . Meanwhile, Monster takes a romantic interest in Samantha. Darrin and Liza arrive, reeking of liquor. Darrin accuses Samantha of playing up to Monster. Samantha taunts him about Liza. However, when Monster winds up to clout Darrin, he bruises his hands on the invisible shield Samantha has created. When Liza slaps Darrin, however, Samantha lets him get the full force of the blow. Later Samantha removes her own protective shield when Darrin tries to make up.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E9
programme.desc: Darrin's workload piles sky-high when Larry Tate and his wife Louise fly to Paris to cover the fashion showings- for a client. Samantha spends most of the time alone playing solitaire. She accepts Endora's invitation to fly to Paris, without a plane, of course, for lunch. In Paris, Samantha and Endora run into the Tates. Larry is surprised, phones Darrin that Samantha and her mother are in Paris with them. Samantha returns home immediately. Darrin tells Samantha their marriage is a mistake, since he has taken her away from all the high living she seems to love. Although Samantha tries to convinces Darrin that he is wrong, she angrily leaves, and returns to Paris. Larry Tate tells Darrin Samantha is lonesome for him. Darrin decides to follow her to Paris. After several unsuccessful tries, Samantha gets on Darrin's plane, and they arrive in Paris together.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E10
programme.desc: Endora tells Samantha that Maurice, her father, is coming to visit. Endora warns Samantha that Maurice will be furious when he learns his daughter has married a mortal. Samantha, determined to stand up to her father, gets Darrin to stay in town on the night Maurice calls. Samantha tells Maurice that her husband is in Washington. The conversation about Darrin proceeds nicely until Maurice surmises Darrin is a mortal. Meanwhile, Darrin, who has been drinking with Larry Tate, phones Samantha and tells her he is coming home. When Darrin arrives, Maurice's fury hits its peak. Al-though Maurice admires Darrin's courage in facing up to him, he makes him disappear. Samantha, expressing her love for Darrin, pleads with Maurice to bring him back. Even Endora joins in Samantha's pleas. Although he tells them it will be extremely difficult, Maurice makes Darrin reappear. Before leaving, Maurice joins his family in a champagne toast. Im-pressed by the rare vintage, Maurice feels Darrin might be one of them after all.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E11
programme.sub-title: It Takes One To Know One
programme.desc: When Darrin starts searching for a "Miss Jasmine" for his firm's perfume account, Endora seizes the opportunity to sew doubt in Samantha's mind about her husband's loyalty. The search for a beautiful model ends when Jannine Fleur arrives. Both Larry and Darrin agree that Jannine is "Miss Jasmine." Samantha learns that Jannine is a witch whom Endora has asked to captivate Darrin. Samantha warns Jannine to keel away from Darrin. Jannine, intrigued, keeps on with her original assign-ment. Darrin uses Larry Tate as his chaperone to keep him from becoming involved with Jannine. Darrin and Larry go to Jannine's apartment to discuss details of the "Miss Jasmine" campaign. Jannine doctors the drinks. Larry falls asleep and Darrin becomes amorous. Just as Darrin starts to kiss Jannine, Samantha uses her witchcraft, and Darrin appears to Jannine as a large ugly fish. When the campaign is completed, Samantha turns the picture of "Miss Jasmine" into a caricature of Jannine.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E12
programme.desc: Larry and Louise Tate have been married for sixteen years and have no children. Louise asks Samantha to go with her to an obstetrician as tests have shown she is going to be a mother. Louise tells Samantha she is afraid to tell Larry since she believes he hates children. Larry, visiting his dentist at the medical center, sees Louise and Samantha enter the obstetrician's office. Thinking Samantha is going to have a baby, he tells Darrin, but cautions him not to say anything until Samantha tells him. In a reverie, Darrin visualizes his children as little witches. He comes to with a sinking feeling. Samantha invites the Tates to dinner. Both Larry and Darrin hover over Samantha, warning her not to exert herself. Louise is all but forgotten, but makes several unsuccessful attempts to tell Larry that he is to be a father. Finally, Samantha tells Larry. He is overjoyed. Although Darrin doesn't tell Samantha about his reverie, he is reassured when she tells him she hopes they have a child who looks just like him.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E13
programme.desc: Samantha's friend, Gertrude, a nice, plain-looking girl expresses her envy of the happiness Samantha has found in marriage. Although Darrin tries to avoid getting mixed up in matchmaking, Samantha persuades him to bring Kermit, a handsome artist, home to dinner to meet Gertrude. Kermit falls for Gertrude. Although Samantha will mot admit it, Darrin suspects Gertrude is a witch and tries to break up her romance with Kermit. Darrin arranges a meeting at a nightspot for Kermit with Susan, a former girl friend. There, Samantha uses witchcraft to get Susan into an argument with Kermit. Susan storms out, unable to recall what has happened. When Gertrude arrives, according to Samantha's plan, Kermit proposes to her.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E14
programme.desc: Darrin's parents pay their first visit to the Stephens home, Darrin's mother, Phyllis, hopes to find that his wife is a poor housekeeper. Soon after, Samantha's Aunt Clara comes down the chimney for an unexpected visit. Darrin is worried about the kind of impression Aunt Clara will make on his parents, but agrees with Samantha that they must make Aunt Clara feel welcome. Determined to help Samantha make a hit with her in-laws, Aunt Clara uses her witchcraft to whip up a feast for dinner. Thinking that Samantha has done the cooking, Phyllis becomes quite upset. Although Samantha warns him to be tactful, Darrin makes Aunt Clara feel she is not wanted. After Aunt Clara's de-parture, Samantha gets into an argument with Darrin, during which Phyllis learns Aunt Clara cooked the dinner. When Samantha admits she is not a good housekeeper, Phyllis, who felt she was being pushed aside, knows she is going to love her daughter-in-law. Darrin persuades Aunt Clare to return and the evening ends happily for all.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized) S1E15
programme.desc: Seven year old Tommy, who lives in an orphanage, is happy to spend Christmas with Gladys and Abner Kravitz. Six year old Michael, also an orphan, derides Tommy's belief is Santa Claus. When Samantha and Darrin bring him home for the holidays, their efforts to get Michael to share in the festivities of the season fail. After Michael admits he would believe in Santa Claus if he really existed, Samantha takes Michael and Darrin on her broomstick to the North Pole, where Michael meets Santa Claus. Later, back at home Darrin and Michael awake. Although both feel they have dreamed the trip, Michael now believes in Santa Claus. Gladys overhears Michael tell Tommy he has met Santa Claus. When she tries to pin Tommy down, he denies that Michael had ever mentioned it. Mrs. Grange, the director of the orphanage, comes to the Stephens home with George and Sarah Johnson. At the Kravitz home, both Gladys and Abner, who are about to return Tommy to the orphanage, express their wish to have someone like Tommy permanently. When Michael leaves with Mr. and Mrs. Johnson, Samantha and Darrin know Michael has found two loving parents.

programme.title: Kanga Pan
programme.desc: Kanga Pan: An African Horror Story is a spine-chilling, one-off wildlife documentary. Who is the killer on the loose? Who is terrorising the pan? An investigation needs to be undertaken.

programme.title: Little Cats
programme.desc: From mysterious lynx to athletic servals and water-bound jungle cats, the little cats of the world are some of the most fascinating and ruthless predators on the planet.

programme.title: Manatees on the Move
programme.desc: Manatees, sea cows, these gentle giants go by several names. They were once thought to be beautiful mermaids that could lure sailors to their deaths, though they probably won't win too many beauty contests. To retain their weight, manatees need to eat for 8 hours and consume 8% of their bodyweight every day. And keeping eating also means keeping moving! Thanks to their tolerance of human visitors, manatees have mates everywhere, working tirelessly to ensure they roam the world for generations to come.

programme.title: The Power of Plants The Great Escape
programme.desc: You think plants are boring or passive? Far from it! They use complex reactions to respond to light, sound and touch. And like in the animal kingdom, different species have developed a near unending list of strategies to ensure their legacy is passed on. Plants have evolved tricks to beat the ele-ments, animal enemies or even other plants: From thorns and spines to poisons and even live-in bodyguards. This two-part series shows the survival strategies of our green “roommates” we share the planet with.

programme.title: Brown Bears Teddy Bears Picnic
programme.desc: If you go down to the woods today a wonderful treat awaits! The home of one of the planet's most loved and characterful animals – the brown bear. Baby bears have a lot to learn about life in the forest, but thankfully all bears know their way around a good picnic.

programme.title: Cheetah: Beating the Odds
programme.desc: A cheetah raises her young family on the vast expanse of the Serengeti. If her cubs are going to survive, she'll have to overcome a barrage of challenges. Lions, gangsters of the plains, are quick to throw their muscle around, whilst hyenas and jackals attempt to steal anything the cheetah manage to kill. The cheetah will have to learn the hunting skills their mother has perfected. Once they've learnt the ropes, they'll make their own way across the plains, establishing territory and having cubs of their own.

programme.title: Mega Nature
programme.desc: The largest animals are some of the most awe-inspiring, but when smaller species come together their combined forces can be even greater.

programme.title: The U.S. East Coast
programme.desc: The journey up the coast continues through Delaware to suburban New Jersey, and onwards into the heart of Manhattan. In Delaware, famous as a corporate tax haven, we visit a winery. In New York City we zip around with a bicycle courier and then head out to Long Island for oysters.

programme.title: The U.S. East Coast
programme.desc: Nowhere is the American way of life as relaxed as on Florida's beaches. The Keys, a chain of islands at the far southern end of the state, reveal a more laid-back side of the USA. But all of Florida amazes -- with secluded beaches, unspoiled nature, and the legacy of the early European settlers.

programme.title: The U.S. East Coast
programme.desc: From New York, the journey up the coast leads into the heart of New England. We visit Yale spend some time in the 19th century mansions at Newport, RI tour the coastal fishing and vacation towns of Massachusetts, and then meet a modern entrepreneur in Boston and see her rooftop gardens.

programme.title: The U.S. East Coast
programme.desc: New Hampshire has only 19 kilometers of coastline and short summers, all the more reason Shauna Fraser takes every opportunity to be by the sea. In the sheltered harbor of Rye, Shauna also targets inner attitude with yoga on a paddleboard.

programme.title: The U.S. East Coast
programme.desc: We travel from Georgia through the Carolinas to Virginia, ending near Washington, DC. Along the way we meet a Georgia farmer talk to painter J. Chris Wilson in Charleston sail along the Outer Banks of Carolina, and visit rural Virginia, experiencing life in the beautiful southern states.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: The palm tree laden beaches on Mexico's Riviera Maya on the Yucatan peninsula are endless, and the turquoise sea with its gentle Caribbean surf is a warm 25 degrees during the mild winter in this part of the world. Between Cancún and Punta Allen, where once there was little more than bushland and a few sleepy fishing villages, vibrant life has evolved during the past three decades. Richard Sowa has lived on a floating island for the past 15 years: an island he built himself out of empty plastic bottles. The bon vivant him-self sees it as a "solution for our planet's refuse problem". Off Punta Allen, a village in the bay of Sian Ka'an, Mexican Mara Coral Ley and her cousin Kim, continue to catch lobsters by adhering to the traditional method and were awarded an "Eco seal for sustainable fishing" for their trouble. It is silent under water off Isla Mujeres and it is here that the artist Jason deCaires has constructed a sculpture park. Hundreds of lifesize figures form an artificial reef at a depth of 12 metres. Fish and plants complete his work of art. The master himself is convinced: "Mother Nature is the true artist".

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: The island of Martinique is a piece of France in the Caribbean, between Florida and South America. And of course, Savoir-vivre applies just as it does on the other side of the Atlantic, between the English Channel and the Mediterranean. Jacky Pascault is the first and only man to cultivate mushrooms in the Caribbean. Everywhere else, they grow on artificially fertilised soil, but Jacky's Champignons Tropicaux flourish on sugar cane fibres. Nicole Vilo tailors hats and dresses out of coconut palms. Of course, the catwalk for the models wearing her first collection is one of the countless dream beaches. The Martiniquais sail on boats they call Yole, which have no keel and are therefore difficult to navigate. The crew members hang over the water in breakneck fashion on long wooden poles. Just the job for Yole-boss Max' "problem kids": they not only learn complicated handling, but also team spirit.

Global investors see the continent as one of the top areas for opportunity and growth, and some African nations are well-positioned to be global hubs for development. programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies run to see Debbie and the children singing songs. A voice trumpet appears and plays a game with Po and Tinky Winky. It's called "Two Little Teletubbies Sitting On A Hill".

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children making Christmas cards. Laa-Laa's present is some lovely decorations. When Noo-Noo tidies them up they tickle his throat, so he throws them out to decorate Home Hill.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A group of children sing some Christmas carols to the Teletubbies. Tinky Winky opens his present to find a beautiful star inside. The Teletubbies follow it all over Teletubbyland, but where will is end up?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and teaches the Teletubbies a winter nursery rhyme. Po's present is a little frosty cloud that begins to snow. All the Teletubbies laugh as they play in the snow.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies see some children visit a level crossing and watch a train pass by. The Teletubbies play their Ready, Steady, Go game.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play a slide game before watching Becky and Jed look for eggs on their farm. Then their mum cooks them for their tea. In Teletubbyland, the Lion and Bear play their hide and seek game.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Alex Pascall and some children sing to their dolls to rock them to sleep. Laa-Laa wants to sing a lovely song, but Tinky Winky is crunching his Tubby Toast too loudly!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa dances with her ball. A little boy tells us why he likes to live in his block of flats. A balloon appears in Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies follow a balloon.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies giggle as they play their 'Through the Arch' game. The windmill stops them to watch a little girl and her dad go for a walk in the town.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies line up to say 'Eh-oh' and then watch Matthew and Mark feed a baby calf. The Teletubbies play a game to see who can eat their Tubby Custard the slowest, but Po can't wait and eats her Tubby Custard very fast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies and some children watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the Naughty Pig. Dipsy's hat keeps blowing away and he has to chase it all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Sour teasing Apple escalates into a "prank war" between the two of them. After the girls' feud disrupts the town, they are sentenced in a Berry Bitty City-style trial to camp alone together for a whole weekend. programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Apple feels left out of a Berryball game and an advanced ballet class, she invents some "groove booties" programmed to dance to any beat. programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When the girls discover that Apple's groove booties can teach the pups to dance, Plum gets an idea for a Doggie Dance Show. Wanting to impress them, Huck offers to have TomTom join the show... despite the pup's obvious dislike of performing in public. It's up to Strawberry to help Huck see that he should not force TomTom into something he just doesn't want to do.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and Orange are dangling their legs in the stream when something tickles Orange's foot. She is sent squealing from the water, certain an eel is after her. Strawberry good-naturedly chuckles at her antics. But Orange gets her dander up and wades into the water to face her "attacker." When she looks down into the water, gazing up at her is the cutest, most adorable, puffy-cheeked fish she's ever seen. It's love at first sight. Orange has to take him home.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: At the next Storytime, Strawberry is going to read a new poem. We see her at the podium as she finishes writing it, one afternoon when no one else is in the café except Custard and Pupcake. Strawberry clears her throat and reads the poem aloud. It's a simple, sweet rhyme about the magic of making wishes on falling stars. She tries a few different rhymes as she goes, noting them on her paper. She is startled to hear applause from Mr. Longface Caterpillar who has heard her recital.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: When Jerry decides it's time to take a little RandR in Europe, he brings the girls with him to work out of WOOHP's European office in Paris - which is located under the Eiffel Tower.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: With little happening in the world of espionage, Sam, Clover and Alex decide to take a little jaunt to the Italian countryside.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: For their third and final Euro-mission, Sam, Clover and Alex are sent to check out the mysterious disappearances of various European fashion critics.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: When Sam, Clover and Alex find themselves under attack at various locations throughout Mali-U, they begin to suspect, because of the nature of the assaults, that past villains are to blame.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: It's a bright, sunny day on the Mali-U campus. As Sam, Clover, Alex and Britney stroll across the quad, they suddenly hear a strange sound. "Woohp! Woohp!"

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: When Clover reads about the opening of a brand new underwater hotel off the coast of Malibu, she's totally psyched. Only when she tries to make a reservation, she's told that it's for VIPs only.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: Scientists make a startling discovery in the Antarctic: a Yeti-like snow creature frozen in a block of ice!

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: Jazz Handz has been released from the WOOHP Containment Facility, having served out his sentence. Meanwhile, early morning at Mali-U, Sam meets covertly with a shadowy contact.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: Sam, on a WOOHP speedboat, arrives near an island where a construction project is in process. She tries to make landfall, but can't penetrate an invisible forcefield...

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: Sam briefs her fellow Spies on what she knows about Jazz Handz and his latest project, Mime World.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: When strange attacks on students are reported all over the Mali-U campus, Jerry enlists Sam, Clover and Alex to check it out - which is, like, waaay convenient because they totally live there!

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: When Clover takes a theatre class at Mali-U, Sam and Alex are forced to sit through her performance (as a lamp post) in a terrible musical.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: When Virgil asks Alex out on a date, she is reluctant. But persistence pays off and her finally convinces her to go to dinner with him.

programme.title: The Dream Forge
programme.desc: As time runs out to face the Dream Forge and become official Dream Chasers, Mateo and his friends enlist the help of the mysterious Dream Bandit.

programme.title: Legendary Places, Ninjago's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Cole joins Jay and Zane inside the Nindroid to solve a mysterious puzzle and also Kai enters Zane's mind and suggests the Ninja take a break from puzzle-solving to figure out which villain is trying to hack their friend.

programme.title: The Oni And The Dragon
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi learns to adjust to the life of a Ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks at Mystake's Tea house, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon biker gang. Remembering that Lloyd managed to arrest one of the gang members at Borg Tower, the Ninja decide to interrogate him to ascertain the location of the third Oni Mask. In order to get him to talk, however, Cole suggests they visit MYSTAKE'S TEA HOUSE to obtain some "truth tea." The truth-tea backfires spectacularly when Cole accidentally switches cups and drinks the tea himself. Zane is able to salvage the situation, however, and obtains a lead. He learns that the Sons of Garmadon frequent a karaoke bar called LAUGHY'S. Zane and Cole don disguises to infiltrate the bar. Cole assumes the alter ego “Rocky Dangerbuff," while Zane adopts the subtler moniker "Snake Jaguar." In order to earn the gang's trust, Cole performs a karaoke routine that is a smash success. Unfortunately, during the routine, his disguise comes loose and he is exposed as a ninja. The Sons of Garmadon attack him, and Zane (who is still in disguise) is unable to intervene. Cole is taken prisoner while Zane is invited back to the Sons of Garmadon's secret base.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh? Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Country Girls
programme.desc: When the girls go to Mia's grandparents' ranch and Olivia accidentally knocks down the neighbor's barn, the girls promise to raise money to rebuild it and now have to learn to set aside their differences and work together to make good on their promise. Mia invites her friends to her grandparents' ranch for the weekend. But when Olivia accidentally knocks down a neighbor's barn with a tractor, the girls promise to raise the money to rebuild it themselves. Complicating matters, Mia and Stephanie turn out to like the same boy, Martin. They'll have to learn to set aside their differences and work together if they're going to raise enough money to make good on their promise.

programme.title: Emma's Dilemma
programme.desc: When Stephanie becomes obsessed with beating her rival Tanya in a float building contest and accidentally disregards Emma's ideas and design, Tanya convinces Emma to join her team to get revenge on Stephanie. When the girls enter a float-building contest, Emma is especially excited to share her design idea for the float. But no one is listening to her, especially Stephanie, who's become obsessed with beating her rival Tanya in the contest. Emma finally does find someone who appreciates her design… Tanya! Tanya convinces Emma to join her team to build the float design. But is Tanya just using Emma to get revenge on Stephanie?

programme.title: Friends of The Jungle
programme.desc: When Olivia's Aunt Sophie is getting married and the groom has gone missing in the jungle, the girls fly out to the jungle in secret to try to find him in time for the wedding. The girls are super excited to be planning a wedding for Olivia's Aunt Sophie. There's just one little problem: Olivia learns that the groom has gone missing in the jungle while working at an animal rescue station! Not wanting to worry her aunt, Olivia, Stephanie and Mia secretly fly to the jungle to try and find the groom, Henry, rescuing a few animals along the way. Too bad Emma and Andrea couldn't keep the secret back in Heartlake City. Now, Sophie, Emma and Andrea join the others in the jungle to try and find Henry before the rapidly approaching wedding date!

programme.title: Can Of Worms
programme.desc: Lloyd moves in and tries to make nice by helping out with chores, but he just gets in the way. Pythor has awoken the Vipoids and the Constrictaurs and an all out snake war has taken over Ninjago. The Ninja are not faring well, when a mysterious Samurai shows up and saves the day.

programme.title: Darkness Shall Rise
programme.desc: With the Devourer destroyed, Ninjago is saved and the rebuilding effort begins. Without their Golden Weapons, the Ninja are stripped of their elemental powers. And with their flying ship ‘The Destiny's Bounty' destroyed, the Ninja are forced to find a new home in the city. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon resurfaces and gains control of the Serpentine as well as transforms the Bounty's wreckage to become ‘The Black Bounty'. The Ninja will battle Scales and discover evil has begun to resurface in Ninjago, while Lord Garmadon will successfully forge the Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.Just as the rebuilding effort in Ninjago begins, the four ninjas come to realize that evil has started to resurface with Lord Garmadon forging the ninjas' lost Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.

programme.title: Pirates Vs. Ninja
programme.desc: When Garmadon by accident brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty – the ruthless Captain Soto and his Pirates - it is up to our ninjas to stop them from plundering Ninjago City. Sharing a tiny, one-bedroom apartment in the city, the Ninja take Lloyd to Grand Sensei Darreth's Mojo Dojo to begin training. There, they discover Lloyd has all four of their natural elemental abilities. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon discovers his Mega-Weapon can't destroy, only create what the user wishes. By accident, Garmadon brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty: Captain Soto and his Pirates, and they mutiny the ship. Answering the age-old question of who would win a fight between pirates and ninja, it's up to our ninja to stop Captain Soto and his men from plundering Ninjago City. In the end, Ninjago City is saved, the Pirates are arrested and Lord Garmadon escapes once again with their Black Bounty.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly's Boarding School, they discover it's a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon's new Mega-Weapo. Realizing how to correctly wield the Mega-Weapon, Lord Garmadon creates evil replicas of the Ninja to face off with our heroes. Meanwhile, Lloyd and the Ninja are invited back the Darkly's Boarding School, only to discover it's a trap and now the bad kids have seized control of the school. With the Ninja trapped in the school with the faculty, things spiral out of control as the Evil Replica Ninja arrive. As an awesome battle takes place in the school halls, the Ninja manage to outsmart their evil versions, and warn Lord Garmadon they're ready for whatever else he throws at them.

programme.title: Fright Knight
programme.desc: Using the Book of Fear, Jestro calls forth Whipperella and uses her to trap the knights in the dark woods where they realize their darkest fears. Searching through the dark forests of the realm, Jestro finds “The Book of Fear.” It's pretty scary. But he feeds it to the book of Book of Monsters, and he uses it to call forth WHIPPERELLA, a monster that can induce fear. One-by-one she uses her “knighmarish” power on the knights and they experiences their own worst fears. Clay fears not living up to the Knights' Code. Lance fears being a nobody. Macy fears never being a knight and Axl fears having no food. Aaron must take the lead because he's fearless he does everything with reckless abandon. It's not until he leads the group out of the forest – as they fight off the Whipperella – that they we find out Aaron's true fear – the fear of peace and quiet and no more challenges or high energy escapades.

programme.title: The Golden Castle
programme.desc: When Lance is cast as the star in the new remake of the classic movie “Ned Knightly and the Golden Castle” he doesn't anticipate Jestro and his monsters invading the set and ruining his starring role. It's movie time! Lance does something very Lance: he agrees to star in a movie about remake of a classic film in Knighton: “The Golden Castle.” While pillaging a village, Jestro and the Book of Monsters see a movie poster for “The Golden Castle” and the book says the legendary Golden Castle is filled with riches! Jestro explains that it's just a dumb movie and that it's not real. It's all based on a “script.” The Book, who's been shelved for many years, wants to eat the movie script to learn more about the modern world. On the set of the movie, Lance has invited the other Knights to act as extras. When they see how Lance is being portrayed, they're incensed. When Jestro attacks the movie set to get the script for his book to eat, the film director keeps rolling. This battle footage is fantastic! The Knights defeat Jestro even though the movie set is trashed. The director will make it work. At the premier of the movie, Lance is embarrassed to see that he's been reduced to comic relief for the realm's bravest Knight…Macy! The director has now made her a star.

programme.title: The Maze Of Amazement
programme.desc: The Knights find themselves trapped in a maze looking for the Book of Deception. But will they actually get their hands on it, or will it keep deceiving them? The Knights travel to the Hill Country in the northern part of Knighton to Axl's home town of DIGGINGTON (where they realize that all of Axl's family look just like him.) While they're there, Merlok 2.0 detects something…one of the Magic Books! It's “The Book of Deception.” They go to find it and discover it ended up under a mountain. And, to make matters worse, the magic book has built a maze around itself to keep it from being found (it is deceptive!) As the NEXO-Knights enter the maze from one side, Jestro enters from the other the Book of Monsters has led him to the maze to get The Book of Deception, too. It's a race through this confusing maze to see who can get the book first. Ava figures out the maze is the Whackman maze from a videogame. After help from Axl's people to defeat Jestro and win the book, the knights discover it's a FAKE BOOK of deception. The Book of Deception created a fake copy of itself!

programme.title: The Black Knight
programme.desc: It seems the NEXO-Knights are attacking villages throughout the realm! But why? A mysterious Black Knight appears to defend the cities from the rogue NEXO-villains! Jestro, happy he has the REAL Book of Deception, uses it to create bad versions of the NEXO-Knights. The “fake” knights then attack villages and hamlets. When the real NEXO-Knights arrive, they're booed and pelted with food. Why does everyone hate them? To make matters more confusing, a giant Mech Suit in black – The BLACK KNIGHT – appears to defend the kingdom's villages from the fake knights. The Black Knight ends up being very powerful and throws Jestro and his fake knights for a loop. He's cool and mysterious. But when the fake Knights get the better of him, the REAL NEXO-Knights appear to fend them off and learn their deceptive secret. The Knights save the Black Knight and they open him up to find…young ROBIN! (He used a deep, deceptive voice.) The Knights realize that Robin has potential. But maybe he still has some learning to do.

programme.title: Chased Dreamers
programme.desc: To craft their own hourglasses and become official Dream Chasers for the Night Bureau, Mateo and his friends must defeat the Dream Forge guardian.

programme.title: The Dream Forge
programme.desc: As time runs out to face the Dream Forge and become official Dream Chasers, Mateo and his friends enlist the help of the mysterious Dream Bandit.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The fate of Earth and Cybertron rests on the Autobots' final battle against Megatron's forces.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Prime tries to resolve a rift between Sumdac and Sari, while Shockwave plans the invasion.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bee tries to keep his team from distraction as they fight Malodor and his Skunkticon posse.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Sideswipe blackmails Strongarm into doing all his work while the team tries to capture crab-like.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Denny and the Bots are captured by the bat-Decepticon Nightstrike.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Autobots and Decepticons unite to save their collapsing universe.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Starscream's fate is revealed as the Quintessons judge Cybertronians.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Windblade fights her way into Iaconus.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Windblade wakes Iaconus but faces a new Quintesson titan.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Iaconus falls, but Megatron returns from the Multiverse with hope.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bumblebee infiltrates Decepticon territory to find a missing friend.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Starscream trusts Thrust and returns to the moon base.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Sabre, Shield and Blaster together create the Hydra Cannon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus and Jetfire attack the ship, but can't stop the Hydra Cannon being deployed.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Dark Energon eruptions alert Autobots to a deeper threat within Earth.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Autobots seek to stop Unicron without destroying Earth help comes unexpectedly.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus and Megatron fight deep underground to stop Unicron's awakening.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron scours the Andes in search of the Crystal of Power.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime assigns the Dinobots to guard a meteorite that contains new and unknown energy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Snappy's Puppet: Snappy has a new trick: he frightens everybody, or tries to, with his hand-puppet dragon. But it gets, shall we say, out of hand when Papa Smurf's magic liquid falls on the puppet and it comes alive. Alive and kicking, what's more, endangering Snappy...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - No Smurf Is An Island: Handy Smurf is the one who fixes everything that needs mending in the Village of the Smurfs. But are his efforts really appreciated by the other Smurfs? Not at all. At least this is what Handy feels when he resolves to leave the Smurfs Village forever and live in the sea with Marina the Mermaid...

programme.title: Farmer's Genie
programme.desc: As Farmer Smurf says, what's a gourd doing in the melon patch, when it should be by the rutabagas? But when Farmer Smurf pulls the gourd out of the ground he frees a genie, which calls him Master and insists on granting him wishes. The genie, called Gourdy, is going to be more of a hindrance than a help in his eagerness to please Farmer Smurf.

programme.title: Poet's Writers' Block
programme.desc: The Smurfs want a poem written for each of them. The pressure overwhelms Poet, so he runs away seeking inspiration. The Wilybeast King captures Poet and forces him to write a poem to cheer up the King's daughter. Poet learns that motivation must come from the heart and cannot be forced.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Crooner Smurf: Harmony Smurf is no longer wanted in the Smurf Choir: his singing is too far off-key. But Papa Smurf gives him an amulet that will make him a vocal virtuoso. Now here comes Hogatha...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby Smurf Is Missing: Thinking Baby Smurf is a leprechaun, two poachers kidnap him and try to get the small one to tell them where his pot of gold is hidden. Papa Smurf organizes everyone to attack the villains with Smurfberry pies so Baby can escape.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfing Out Of Time: None of the Smurfs seem to have time to play with the Smurflings. They go on a visit to Father Time and come across the River of Time, the great current that flows along majestically, carrying with it all the time in the world. And then an accident occurs, with untimely consequences...

programme.title: Tailor's Magic Needle
programme.desc: Tailor Smurf has to make an outfit for every Smurf before the Fall fashion show. Brainy Smurf wants to help him and, using Papa Smurf's book of Magic, he conjures up a magic needle that sews ten times faster than tailor... But is it really any good?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Memory Melon: Selwyn and Tallulah are two powerful married wizards. The trouble is, they fight all the time. But the energy from their arguments is brewing up a dreadful storm and Papa has to get them to make up before the storm starts to rage.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Smurf For Denisa: Balthazar brings Denisa to Gargamel to baby-sit. But Gargamel loses Denisa in the wood and she and Sassette meet and become friends. Sassette and Denisa work together to free the Smurfs from Gargamel's stewpot, and prove you don't have to be big to be brave.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Peewit's Unscrupulous Adventure: Peewit, the court jester, is the Smurfs' human friend. There is to be a celebration at the King's castle and Peewit good-humouredly invites his little blue friends to the feast. But they learn that the wicked chamberlain is pilfering the King's possessions.

programme.title: The Smurfiest Of Friends
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf had one friend: Clumsy Smurf. But poor Clumsy is so, well, clumsy, that Brainy refuses to see him again. So now he is left without anyone willing to listen to him. Maybe Buddy, the good-looking imp met by chance near the Great Oak can be a pal for Brainy....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Poltersmurf: There are few things Grandpa Smurf enjoys more than telling a good scary story, and there are few Smurfs who don't love to listen. But things get a little too much for Brainy Smurf when Grandpa tells of Poltersmurfs, and Poltersmurfs begin harrowing Brainy...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Greedy And The Porridge Pot: The good fairy, Guinilda gives Greedy a magic porridge pot that Brainy causes to overflow into the village and forest. The good-hearted fairy hurries to the rescue and then asks for the pot back to give to an orphanage of hungry children.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Most Unsmurfy Games: To prove the worth of his Big Book of Wilderness Survival, Brainy takes the Smurflings to the swamp. Where, thanks to his expert advice, the tiny group gets totally lost, is then caught in quicklime and trapped by King Bullrush of the Wartmongers. Fortunately, Bullrush is in a playful mood and devises a Smurf hunt. Unfortunately, Brainy believes he is a born leader...

programme.title: Smurf Box Derby
programme.desc: Handy Smurf makes another invention: the Smurfmobile. Each Smurf has his – or her – customized vehicle and all, or almost all, the Smurfs enjoy a little spin... But then the evil wizard Gargamel gets hold of the idea and starts making trouble for the Smurfs...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Noble Stag: His wicked cousin, Malcolm the Mean, who plans to kill him and mount him in his trophy room, has turned King Gerard into a black stag. The little Smurfs help their friend. When King Gerard is transformed back into his human form, Malcolm becomes imprisoned in the body of the stag.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Curried Smurfs: In Ancient India, the unscrupulous fakir Gargapuri sells the Smurfs to the Rajah for his private zoo. Only Grandpa, Wild Smurf and Jokey are free, so it's up to them to sneak into the palace and rescue their friends. Along the way they free all the caged animals in the Raja's menagerie.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hopping Cough Smurfs: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Sorcerer Smurf: Gargamel creates the legend of Sorcerer Smurf to lure Papa Smurf and his smurfy friends into a trap at his mountain hideaway. Papa Smurf outwits the wicked wizard with some of his own magic and Gargamel is chased down the mountain and back to his castle.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurf Who Would Be King: Dreamy yearns to be King after reading a story about them. He falls through a whirlpool while on his ship and finds himself in the land of pokies who think Dreamy is their long-lost King. When he confronts the pokies' enemies, the Norfnags, he finds they aren't fearful at all. Dreamy bumps his head and wakes up to discover it was just a dream, yet finds a jewel in his cap, just like the ones the pokies mine for a living.

programme.title: The Rabbids are in love.
programme.desc: A rabbid falls in love with the Teleporta-TV, enticed by the machine's incredible capacities.

programme.title: The Rabbids have a great plan.
programme.desc: Four rabbids find a wooden horse and tries to make it move by all means, while drawing Zak's attention.

programme.title: The Rabbids have to be cunning.
programme.desc: After his pals seemingly managed to reach the moon, a rabbid fins himself alone in the junkyard.

programme.title: The Rabbids are locked up!
programme.desc: The Rabbids are shut inside a supermarket after closing hours.

programme.title: The Rabbids are moving.
programme.desc: A Rabbid has fun playing a game where he suddenly jumps out of a box to surprise his friends.

programme.title: The Rabbids are panicking!
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding, two Rabbids become convinced that their boss has turned into a balloon.

programme.title: The Rabbids VS The Animals.
programme.desc: In the country, two Rabbids become fascinated by a fly.

programme.title: The Rabbids are in the Moon
programme.desc: A sculptor inadvertently compresses the rabbids' rocket ship.

programme.title: The Rabbids lead the investigation.
programme.desc: When a thief robs a piece from Hibernation Rabbid's Teleporta-TV, Investigator Rabbid leads the investigation

programme.title: Revenge of the Rabbids.
programme.desc: Blasted into the Polar Regions when his secret HQ explodes, Evil Rabbid raises a penguin army!

programme.title: The Rabbids meet the Cro-Magnons.
programme.desc: Mama Cro-Magnon is on the brink of inventing the wheel when the Rabbids decide to interfere.

programme.title: Dumb dreams.
programme.desc: The Chief Rabbid is inventing new tasks for the Rabbids.

programme.title: The Rabbids land at the North Pole.
programme.desc: Taking pity on a pack of frozen fish, the rabbids decide to set it free and embark on a risky mission.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Scratch and Grounder use Robotnik's new Slo-Mo Ray Gun to capture Sonic, Tails rescues him by reversing the gun and turning it on a tribe of friendly Tree Sloth People who become a high speed commando strike force against Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails and other Mobius citizens are lured into Robotnik's robotic games of chance, and when they lose they're sent to slave labor camps. Sonic rescues Tails and the others by beating the house in games of chance at Robotnik's Casino.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: In order to free Sketch Lampoon (a satirical comic book artist) from Robotnik's new high security prison, Sonic allows himself to be captured, then makes a high speed rescue and escape.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Tails gets trapped in the "Warp of Confusion" (an Escher-like world of another dimension) by Robotnik's cousin, Dr. Warpnik, Sonic comes to the rescue and traps Robotnik and his badniks in the warp.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.sub-title: Close Encounter of the Sonic Kind
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails befriend a pair of aliens who crash land their spaceship on Mobius. Sonic has to avoid Robotnik's ULTRA-GRAVITIZER (sort of a hedgehog flypaper) to help fix their ship and blast-off back home.

programme.title: Sonic Christmas Blast
programme.desc: Santa Claus has made an announcement - he is retiring and has picked the perfect successor - "Robotnikclaus"! Sonic and his sister resolve to persuade Santa to return and set Christmas straight. When the two track down the Santa who made the announcement, they discover he is just a phony robot and the real Santa Claus is being held prisoner.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Coconuts is exiled by Robotnik to a remote jungle, where he uses a giant baby ape to destroy villages. But Sonic exposes Coconuts as a robot, and the baby ape's real Dad takes Coconuts and the baby ape away for a spanking.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Outraged by a new hit song written about Sonic, Robotnik outlaws music on Mobius then takes pop star, Catty Carlisle captive. With his MD (Music Destroyer) Robot, Robotnik terrorizes the music loving Mobius population till Sonic rescues Catty.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: A fast talking, travelling salesman named Wes Weasley sells Robotnik various hedgehog-catching gadgets, including the Darkenator, the Super-duper Gravity Stopper, and the De-Atomizer.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic rescues Lucas, a rival of Robotnik's, from Robotnik's dungeons. But Robotnik will do anything to keep Lucas from finding his lost love, Lucinda, including proposing to her himself.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Big Griz, leader of a group of biker-bear rebels, mistakes Scratch and Grounder for Sonic and Tails, and teams up with S and G to attack the real Sonic and Tails.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Sonic decides to find Tails a suitable foster home, Robotnik finds out, and creates a robot fox family which poses as Tails' long lost parents. Sonic leaves Tails with the fox family, but finally realizes they're robots and rescues Tails.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: An elderly, out of shape, overweight superhero keeps trying to help Sonic battle Dr. Robotnik, and keeps getting him in more jepordy. Sonic helps the old hero regain his self respect and they team up to battle Robotnik's latest scheme.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Get a Life, Don't Save One
programme.desc: Donkey Kong saves Bluster's life, causing him to think he owes Donkey Kong a favor. He tries to protect Donkey Kong from everything, while Diddy and Funky try to stop him from doing it.

programme.title: SONIC X Sonic's Scream Test
programme.desc: Chris' mother Lindsey is shooting a movie in an old castle and Sonic and his friends are there to visit as well. However, they begin to notice that something is amiss as ghostly figures begin to appear.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Orangutango
programme.desc: Donkey Kong and Candy train to compete in a dance contest against King K. Rool and Krusha. Because Donkey Kong can't dance, he wants some help from Funky.

programme.title: SONIC X Cruise Blues
programme.desc: Sonic and his friends are on a cruise when the Egg Fort appears inside a glacier. As Sonic faces his foes, he receives some help from Knuckles.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Double Date Trouble
programme.desc: Donkey Kong tries have lunch with Candy on her day off and watch a movie with Diddy at the same time. He also has to get Bluster to replace some of the booby traps around the Crystal Coconut.

programme.title: SONIC X The Adventures of Knuckles and Hawk
programme.desc: Knuckles rescues a man named Hawk from ancient ruins. Discovering later that Hawk had discovered a chaos emerald, Knuckles seeks for him once again in Oriental City. There he is confronted by some local thugs Li Yan and the Bruiser Boys.

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Roblox Rumble Roblox Rumble
programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Cranky's Tickle Tonic
programme.desc: Cranky tries to stop Eddie the Mean Old Yeti's constant noisy groaning. Meanwhile, Donkey Kong and Diddy follow the runaway Crystal Coconut, that floated out of Cranky's house due to a magic spell.

programme.title: SONIC X The Dam Scam
programme.desc: When Sonic, Tails, Chris and the Egg Fort crash land on the Nature Continent after a fight, Tails and Chris protest against a dam while Sonic is caught in a battle against Decoe, Bocoe, E-65 and Eggman

programme.title: Fortress: Sniper's Eye
programme.desc: Fortress: Sniper's Eye is an explosive, all-out-action cyber-thriller starring action megastar Bruce Willis with Jesse Metcalfe (Escape Plan II) and Chad Michael Murray (Riverdale).

programme.title: What Doesn't Kill You
programme.desc: What Doesn't Kill You follows the story of two childhood friends Brian and Paulie. The pair have grown up on the tough and unforgiving streets of South Boston doing whatever they can to survive in the dog-eat-dog neighborhood and ultimately falling under the sway of a powerful crime boss.

programme.title: Barbershop
programme.desc: Calvin (Ice Cube) is a would-be entrepreneur with big plans...and running his family's barbershop isn't one of them. But when he impulsively sells the shop to a shady loan shark, he soon realizes just how important the neighborhood parlor is to him... and just how far he'll go to get it back!

programme.title: Girl Most Likely
programme.desc: Kristen Wiig stars as Imogene, once a promising young New York playwright whose promise has fizzled, thanks to a crisis of confidence. Heavily in denial about being dumped by her society boyfriend, Imogene uses her skill for drama to stage an elaborate fake suicide as an appeal for his sympathy.

programme.title: Playing for Keeps
programme.desc: Playing For Keeps is a romantic comedy about a former soccer star who returns home to put his life back together. Looking for a way to rebuild his relationship with his son, he gets roped into coaching the boy's soccer team.

programme.title: Albion: The Enchanted Stallion
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl is transported by a magical black stallion to the mystical world of ALBION, where she discovers that she alone is the key to saving an entire race of people.

programme.title: Triple Cross
programme.desc: During WW2, convicted bank robber Eddie Chapman becomes a triple agent working for both the British and the Germans.

programme.title: A Puppy for Christmas
programme.desc: After adopting a cute puppy, Noelle's world is turned upside down when her boyfriend breaks up with her. After accepting an invitation to spend the holidays with a co-worker, she is surrounded by the Christmas cheer of a happy family and soon sparks begin to fly.

programme.title: A Christmas Story
programme.desc: The perfect Christmas story for all the family. Join eight-year old Julius as he embarks on a magical journey! Growing up in an orphanage, Julius has always been a bit of an outsider. However, one day he is wondrously transported to a frosty and enchanted world where, with the help of Herman the marzipan pig and Sophina the glass angel, he sets off to save Santa from the wicked hands of Crampus.

programme.title: Species: Species (1995)
programme.desc: She's beautiful, seductive, intelligent, and her charms could spell doom for the entire human race! Ben Kingsley, Forrest Whitaker and Natasha Henstridge star in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi hit.

programme.title: Be Cool
programme.desc: John Travolta is back as Chili Palmer in this sequel to "Be Cool." With an all-star cast that includes Uma Thurman and The Rock, "Be Cool" is the hilarious tale about a gangster-turned-music-mogul...and what it takes to be number one with a bullet!

programme.title: Masters Of The Universe
programme.desc: The fantastic exploits of He-Man and his arch rival, the evil Skeletor, are brought to the big screen for the first time in this live-action adventure.

programme.title: Agent Cody Banks 2: Destination London
programme.desc: Traveling to London, Agent Cody Banks attends a prestigious school where he gets close to a man who is working with his arch villain Molay.

programme.title: Hard Candy
programme.desc: Tables are turned on a predator when he unwittingly engages in a game of cat and mouse with a teenage girl.

programme.title: Lovelace
programme.desc: Linda Lovelace is used by the porn industry at the behest of her husband before taking control of her life.

programme.title: Killer Joe
programme.desc: When a debt puts a man's life in danger, he turns to putting a hit out on his mother in order to collect the insurance.

programme.title: The Philadelphia Experiment II
programme.desc: The sole survivor of a wartime experiment is sent 41 years into the future and must race to save the world.

programme.title: Benji's Very Own Christmas Story
programme.desc: On a surprise visit to meet Kris Kringle, Benji and his friends are shocked to discover that he plans to take the night off on Christmas Eve!

programme.title: Saving Santa
programme.desc: Once upon a time, Santa operated with just a small workshop and a few elves. But, as Christmas has grown ever bigger, Santa has been forced to innovate! Now his cleverest elves develop amazing technology, including a hologram to hide the North Pole and a time machine to allow Santa to deliver presents to every home in the world, in just the one night. Bernard is an elf who dreams of creating such inventions, but his job is to clean the reindeer stables! Yet when he creates an amazing Christmas memory machine, his luck might be changing. But Bernard's invention is broken by a curious elf, causing the North Pole's power to fail and the hologram hiding it to disappear. Now exposed to the outside world, it is spotted by Santa's enemy, Neville Baddington, who is determined to steal Santa's secrets for himself. The only person who can stop him is Bernard.

programme.title: Christmas Couple's Retreat
programme.desc: Three couples attend a retreat to strengthen their respective relationships under the guidance of a famed therapist. But as the holiday season unfolds, unexpected challenges arise when the therapist must confront some feelings of her own, and sparks fly when one couple's son unexpectedly falls for the charming retreat manager. Will this festive getaway reignite these couples' love, or will it lead them down an entirely new path?

programme.title: 12 Dogs of Christmas
programme.desc: A girl who uses dogs to teach people about the true meaning of Christmas during the Depression.

programme.title: The Three Dogateers Save Christmas
programme.desc: When a couple of burglars make off with their family's presents and decorations, the Three Dogateers set off on a journey to sniff out the bad guys and save Christmas!

programme.title: A Young Man with High Potential
programme.desc: This shocking, controversial horror thriller sees an uptight man succumb to his inner desires. Piet is a socially awkward, lonely and reclusive student, who catches up on classes online. This changes when he is forced to partner a project with new student Klara. Soon he becomes fixated with her. After his advances are rebuffed, he starts down a dark and despicable path.

programme.title: Rise of the Krays
programme.desc: The early years of the two of the most notorious British criminals are portrayed in visceral brutality. London, 1961: Ronnie and Reggie Kray begin a reign of terror that would define London's East End for years to come. From protection rackets to members' clubs, street brawls to arson via blackmail extending all the way up to the Cabinet Office, the Krays rained red on anyone who crossed them.

programme.title: Chichinette: The Accidental Spy
programme.desc: One womans extraordinary journey! This shocking true story puts espionage, secret intelligence and sheer determination at centre stage. After the 1944 liberation of Paris, a Jewish nurse is enlisted by the French Secret Service and sent to Germany. After failed attempts, she finally crosses the border but to stay undercover she must assimilate with the enemy to defeat the Nazis.

programme.title: The Free World
programme.desc: A gripping exploration of freedom. After serving time for a crime he didn't commit, Mo struggles to put his past behind him until a dramatic encounter binds him with Doris and he finds himself risking everything to protect her. Featuring explosive performances from Elisabeth Moss (The Handmaids Tale), Boyd Holbrook (Logan) and Academy Award winner Octavia Spencer (The Help). Highly approved!

programme.title: The Song to My Heart
programme.desc: (2021) Lyrical romance with Lanie McAuley. After a childhood touring with her singer-songwriter dad, tea room owner and part-time poet Bonnie wants nothing to do with music - until Ryder walks in...

programme.title: Love At First Dance
programme.desc: Hope is tasked with teaching Manhattan's most eligible bachelor how to dance ahead of his society wedding. Will their blossoming student-teacher relationship ultimately jeopardise the wedding? (2018)

programme.title: Wedding of Dreams
programme.desc: (2018) Romance with Debbie Gibson. Debbie loves her new life with Noah, mentoring young musicians. But when there's a chance to revive her pop career, will she give it all up?

programme.title: Summer of Dreams
programme.desc: (2016) Romance with Debbie Gibson. A faded pop star hits the wrong notes in life. Soon she moves home, mentors young musicians, and discovers fame is fleeting, but love lasts.

programme.title: In The Key Of Love
programme.desc: (2019) Romance with Laura Osnes. Producer Jake goes home for his sister's wedding, only to find his ex, Maggie, behind the camera. Will a picture-perfect setting spark old flames?

programme.title: Love, Rosie
programme.desc: Rosie and Alex have been best friends since age six. As they dream of travelling the world, they decide to leave their small British town for Boston together to attend university. But fate has other plans...

programme.title: Conversations With Other Women
programme.desc: When a man (Aaron Eckhart) and a woman (Helena Bonham Carter) flirt with each other at a wedding reception, the sexual tension seems spontaneous. As they break from the party to a hotel room, the flirtation turns into a night filled with passion and remorse.
